One Venture at a Time

Blytz Ventures creates and scales innovative platforms across Southeast Asia. From AI assistants to talent matching, we're building what's next.

Our Ventures Get in Touch

About Blytz Ventures

We exist to drive innovation, market speed, and build impactful companies. Our startup studio model creates, funds, and scales subsidiaries that shape the future.

Speed & Agility

Fast execution cycles that bring ideas to market quickly

Cross-Industry Innovation

Where technology meets diverse sectors for breakthrough solutions

Scalable Impact

Targeting high-growth, high-impact markets globally

Founded 2024
Active Projects: 4
Future Pipeline: Expanding

Our Ventures

Our portfolio of platforms driving innovation across Southeast Asia.

Blytz Cloud

AI Assistant Platform

Platform for deploying personalized OpenClaw AI assistants via Telegram.

Go Docker Stripe

Blytz Marketplace

E-Commerce / Live Auction

E-commerce with live auctions, real-time bidding, Stripe Connect.

Go Next.js Stripe

Blytz Work

Talent Matching

Fastest job matching platform. From job posted to hired in under 1 hour.

Node.js Next.js Firebase

Blytz Site

Website Builder

Website builder and management platform with custom plugins.

Go Next.js Caddy

The Blytz Ventures Approach

Our startup studio model creates, funds, and scales subsidiaries through a proven framework that transforms innovative ideas into market-leading companies.
